rulings.Rulings: continued to march 18, 2019. notice was served january 6, 2019 for a hearing on february 4, 2019, which is less than the 30 days required by Probate Code section 850. in addition, the NOH did not include the mandatory language in Probate Code section 851(c). new notice must be personally served no later than february 16, 2019 in order for notice to be proper. once notice is proper, the filings can be reviewed in preparation for hearing.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN RE THE CLOTILDE CARCAMO FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Validity Of Revised And Restated Trust And Amendments Thereto; For Damages And Other Relief For Financial Elder Abuse; Et Al.
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Parties to address issues for trial. 2) Only 3 of the petitioners to Petition to Remove filed on 11/27/18 have signed/verified the petition (Isabel Arostegui, Amanda Hosea, Jessica Hosea, and Jonathan Hosea have not signed/verified). 3) Personal notice has not been given to Claudia Carcamo Arostegui and Gabriela Carcamo, who are respondents to an PC §850 petition but are not beneficiaries of the trust, as restated and amended. Counsel should also clarify whether Gabriela Carcamo is the same person as Fabiola Carcamo, who was named in a 2006 trust amendment. 4) File stamped courtesy copy of the following pleadings have not been provided: a.Amendment to Petition for Removal filed on 12/11/18. b.Opening Brief by Jorge Carcamo filed on 1/11/19 and declaration in support.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN RE THE CLOTILDE CARCAMO FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Removal Of Trustee; Suspension Of Powers Of Trustee; Appointment Of Temporary Trustee; Determination That Leases And Deeds Are Invalid; For Redress Of Breaches Of Trust; Financial Elder Abuse; And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Parties to address issues for trial. 2) Only 3 of the petitioners to Petition to Remove filed on 11/27/18 have signed/verified the petition (Isabel Arostegui, Amanda Hosea, Jessica Hosea, and Jonathan Hosea have not signed/verified). 3) Personal notice has not been given to Claudia Carcamo Arostegui and Gabriela Carcamo, who are respondents to an PC §850 petition but are not beneficiaries of the trust, as restated and amended. Counsel should also clarify whether Gabriela Carcamo is the same person as Fabiola Carcamo, who was named in a 2006 trust amendment. 4) File stamped courtesy copy of the following pleadings have not been provided: a.Amendment to Petition for Removal filed on 12/11/18. b.Opening Brief by Jorge Carcamo filed on 1/11/19 and declaration in support.
